_doc: Single source of truth for Pluralscape color tokens. Edit here. Run `node tokens/build.mjs` to regenerate colors_and_type.css and ui_kits/mobile/theme.js. Mode overrides live alongside the default values; consumers apply them via [data-mode='…'].

paleRose.doc: Intimate — RARE accent (~10%). Personal/member-private surfaces only: solo composer, intimate-share badges, self-only privacy buckets, system-level 'just for you' empty states. Never in nav, primary buttons, default focus rings, default badges.

_paletteRatios._doc: Lavender 60% : Teal 30% : Rose 10%. Rose is RARE, not a sibling. If a layout would place Rose adjacent to Teal in chrome, demote Rose. Enforce by review.

spaceMist.doc: Elevated surface — cards, modals. Independently tuned shade of deepSpaceBlue; if you rebrand the canvas, hand-re-pick this and friends.

nebula.doc: Subtle bg differentiation. Independently tuned shade of deepSpaceBlue.

surfaceHover.doc: Hover state for spaceMist surfaces. Independently tuned.

lavenderBright.doc: Focus rings AND inline link color (E1). Distinguishes links from primary buttons (which use softLavender).

lavenderHi.doc: Primary-button hover. ~+18% L vs softLavender so the hover delta is actually perceptible (E2).

dustyCrimson.doc: Littles-mode danger (B2). Distinct from amber warning, still desaturated and gentle.

borderStrong.doc: WCAG 1.4.11 — interactive chrome (inputs, toggles, checkboxes, buttons). 4.46:1 on card; ~4:1 on bg. Real headroom over the 3:1 target (B1).

fgOnAccent.doc: Always — never Moonlight on accent fills.

accent.doc: Primary-button fill. NOT link color — see linkColor (E1).

linkColor.doc: Inline link color. Distinct from accent so a paragraph with one link doesn't read as a button-colored word (E1).

interactiveOn.doc: Toggle/Switch 'on' state. Distinct from success — toggling a notification on must not read as 'fronting' (B4).

modes._doc: Mode overrides MERGE on top of semantic.default. Only keys that change need to be listed.

static._doc: (B3) Static mode — formerly 'low-sensory'. Flat fills, no glow, gradients freeze, motion clamps to 0. Strictest sensory mode. For users who want motion *reduced but not eliminated*, use 'reduced-motion' instead.

reduced-motion._doc: (B3) Motion-only accommodation — visuals untouched, durations clamped to ≤50ms. Respects OS prefers-reduced-motion when applied alongside it. Use for vestibular sensitivity without sensory flattening.

high-contrast._doc: Promote interactive borders to borderStrong everywhere; promote muted text to fg; remove surface tinting; brighten accent.

littles._doc: Littles Safe Mode. Softer accent (Pale Rose), no scary Crimson, friendlier surfaces. Component layer additionally enlarges targets and hides destructive actions. (B2) `danger` uses dustyCrimson — desaturated red, distinct from amber `warning`.
